ddls:
CREATE TABLE "benchmarks" (
  "benchmark_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benchmark */,
  "benchmark_name" TEXT /* Name of the benchmark */,
  "benchmark_description" TEXT /* Description of the benchmark */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the benchmark was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the benchmark was last updated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the benchmark */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the benchmark */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the benchmark */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benchmark_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benchmark_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benchmark result */,
  "benchmark_id" INTEGER /* ID of the benchmark */,
  "mode" TEXT /* Mode of the benchmark (e.g., thrpt) */,
  "threads" INTEGER /* Number of threads used in the benchmark */,
  "samples" INTEGER /* Number of samples collected */,
  "score" REAL /* Performance score of the benchmark */,
  "score_error" REAL /* Error margin for the performance score */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the performance score (e.g., ops/ns) */,
  "execution_date" TEXT /* Date and time the benchmark was executed */,
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the environment where the benchmark was run */,
  "benchmark_version" TEXT /* Version of the benchmark that was executed */,
  "execution_time" INTEGER /* Time it took to execute the benchmark */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the benchmark result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmark_results_environment_id FOREIGN KEY ("environment_id") REFERENCES environments ("environment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmark_results_benchmark_id FOREIGN KEY ("benchmark_id") REFERENCES benchmarks ("benchmark_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environments" (
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environment */,
  "environment_name" TEXT /* Name of the environment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the environment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the environment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the environment was last updated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the environment */,
  "os" TEXT /* Operating system of the environment */,
  "hardware_specifications" TEXT /* Hardware specifications of the environment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("environment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, admin, tester) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benchmark_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "benchmark_id" INTEGER /* ID of the benchmark */,
  "key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the metadata was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the metadata was last updated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the metadata */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmark_metadata_benchmark_id FOREIGN KEY ("benchmark_id") REFERENCES benchmarks ("benchmark_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmark_metadata_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environment_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the environment */,
  "key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the metadata was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the metadata was last updated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the metadata */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environment_metadata_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environment_metadata_environment_id FOREIGN KEY ("environment_id") REFERENCES environments ("environment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "result_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the benchmark result */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was last updated */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for threaded comments) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_result_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_result_comments_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES benchmark_results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benchmark_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "benchmark_id" INTEGER /* ID of the benchmark */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the benchmark */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the version was last updated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Changelog for the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmark_versions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmark_versions_benchmark_id FOREIGN KEY ("benchmark_id") REFERENCES benchmarks ("benchmark_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "result_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the benchmark result */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the benchmark version */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the result (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the history entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the history entry was last updated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who updated the history entry */,
  "status_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the status change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_result_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_result_history_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES benchmark_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_result_history_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES benchmark_results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the benchmark or result */,
  "benchmark_id" INTEGER /* ID of the benchmark */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the benchmark result */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time the benchmark or result was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user who accessed the benchmark or result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES benchmark_results ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_benchmark_id FOREIGN KEY ("benchmark_id") REFERENCES benchmarks ("benchmark_id")
)
